ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Artist's social media handle */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Record label of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., State, Country) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the region belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Concert, Festival) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the event is held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the event is held */,
  "ticket_price" TEXT /* Average ticket price for the event */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist performing */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the performance takes place */,
  "is_headline" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the artist was the headline act */,
  "performance_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the artist performed at the event */,
  "set_length" INTEGER /* Length of the artist's set in minutes */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the artist's performance (out of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_performances_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Concert, Festival) */,
  "total_performances" INTEGER /* Total number of performances by the artist in the region */,
  "total_headline_performances" INTEGER /* Total number of headline performances by the artist in the region */,
  "total_concerts" INTEGER /* Total number of concerts by the artist in the region */,
  "total_festivals" INTEGER /* Total number of festivals by the artist in the region */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the artist's performances in the region */,
  "total_tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of tickets sold for the artist's performances in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media entry */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Instagram, Twitter) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the artist on the platform */,
  "engagement_rate" TEXT /* Engagement rate of the artist on the platform (out of 100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticketing" (
  "ticketing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticketing entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "ticket_vendor" TEXT /* Name of the ticket vendor (e.g., Ticketmaster, Eventbrite) */,
  "total_tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of tickets sold for the event */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue generated from ticket sales for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticketing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticketing_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Data Analyst, Event Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizers" (
  "event_organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event organizer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
